name: agent_capability_phase102_full_mode_execution_gate
prompt: Please run the Phase102 full-mode Computer Use execution gate acceptance.
prompt_lines: Please run one Phase 102 universal Computer Use full-mode execution gate acceptance. Use only the project terminal self-check command in safe contract mode. Do not interact with any user window, do not open real apps, do not click, do not type into the desktop, do not install dependencies, do not change registry, and do not change Windows settings. The final answer must include the fixed marker: PHASE102_FULL_MODE_EXECUTION_GATE_READY.

You must call the terminal tool and run this verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use_mcp_v2.windows_runtime.universal_live_execution import phase102_main; raise SystemExit(phase102_main())"

Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE102_FULL_MODE_EXECUTION_GATE_OK, the final answer's last line must completely copy: PHASE102_FULL_MODE_EXECUTION_GATE_READY PHASE102_FULL_MODE_EXECUTION_GATE_OK normal_mode_blocks_launch_app=true full_mode_session_used=true full_mode_action_ready=true full_launch_authorized_recording_only=true full_launch_no_physical_dispatch=true low_level_event_count_zero=true real_desktop_touched=false uncontrolled_actions_expanded=false
